titleStmt.title: SII 25.142: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 142. (A.R. No. 142 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the Sundararājaperumāḷ temple.

This fragmentary record begins with the praśasti, Pūmaruviyatirumaḍandaiyum, etc., of the king. The rest of the portion of the record is lost. The inscription may be assigned to about the 13th Century on grounds of palaeography.
The extant portion mentions his queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvi maruviya kalaimaṭantaiyum jayamaṭantaiyu nalañciṟappak koḷārnta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulaintoḷippa vāḷārnta poṟkirimel—The ends of the lines are built in.
muvakait tamiḻu muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nāl vaḷaravaivakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉaiyiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camaiyamu maḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuvakaippāṭalu miyaluṭaṉ paravaveṇṭicai yaḷavu—
mpiyar pallavar mutaliya pāttiva rellām Oruvar muṉoruvar muṟaikaṭava taṭantiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñca Ilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭiyintiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṅkati rār mārpiṉiṟ poliyap pa
lakkaṉṉi cūṇāṭṭuk kayalāṇai kaivaḷara ve ḷiyum veḻamum parappi tañcaiyu muṟantaiyuñ centaḻal koḷutti kāviyu nilamuniṉṟu kaviṉiḻappa vāviyum yāṟu vaḷarkkak kūṭamu māmatiluṅ kopuramu māṭara
kaḻutai koṇṭuḻutu kavaṭiviccic cempiyaṉai veḷaikoṇṭavaṉ teviyarai veḷameṟṟip paim poṉ maṇimuṭi paṟittup pāṇaṉukkuk koṭuttaruḷip pāṭaruñ ciṟappiṟ parutivāṉṟoyu māṭakappuricai Āyira
saṉattu vaḷaṅkeḻu kavariyirumaruṅkacaippa kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅku kaḷinalliyāṉai vaṭapulaventar maṇippuyam piriyā Ilaṅku kuḻaiyarivaiyar toḻutu niṉṟettu mulakamuḻutu muṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya komāṟa—The rest of the record is not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 25.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
